title: Minecraft Like Never Before
description: Experience Minecraft like never before. Stunning visuals, new creatures, endless exploration.
body:
![Minecraft Like Never Before logo](https://i.imgur.com/NvC85Wq.png)

|Discover Minecraft in a whole new light with "Minecraft Like Never Before. This meticulously crafted modpack transforms the familiar blocky world into a realm of stunning visuals and endless possibilities.|
|:-:|
|(Install this [additional mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-cubes-reloaded/download/5288774) for a better effect!)|


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

✅ Completely change the game graphics like never before!.

✅ Make blocks way smoother even turning them into non-cubic shapes (Require this [additional mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-cubes-reloaded/download/5288774)).

✅ More than 200 new structures ready for you to explore.

✅ Added tons of new mobs from real life and fantasy.

✅ Modify Minecraft's terrain generation to make it more immersive.

✅ Explore more than 100 new biomes consisting of both realism and light fantasy.

✅ Transforms the boring Vanilla end into an alien dimension you've never seen before.

✅ Improve the old lighting engine to a true realistic one.

✅ 10 performance mods to keep the game as smooth as possible.

</details>



![4 preview images of this modpack](https://i.imgur.com/YCvbDPi.jpeg)
